evals.prompt: Generate test cases for the AI refresh feature. The requirement is: Add a 'Refresh AI' button on the proposal editing page. Clicking it calls the backend API to regenerate AI content. The 'Enable AI' switch must be turned on as a precondition to use this feature. When the switch is off, the button is grayed out and cannot be clicked.
evals.expected_output: Generated test case documents in test_case/{date}/ including functional analysis, test points table, and detailed test cases grouped by P0/P1/P2 priority
expectations: The output includes a functional analysis table identifying core features, related modules, and risk levels
The output includes a test point table with numbered test points, types, priorities, and test methods
P0 test cases cover core functionality like button click behavior and switch dependency
P1 test cases cover boundary and combination scenarios
At least one negative/abnormal scenario is included (e.g., switch off, repeated clicks)
Test cases follow the specified format with Test Objective, Preconditions, Test Steps, Expected Result, and Business Value sections
Output files are saved to test_case/{date}/ directory

evals.prompt: Design test points for this requirement: The knowledge source configuration module adds an 'Auto Sync' switch. When enabled, the system automatically syncs data from the external knowledge base every day at 2 AM. The switch is off by default. When sync fails, an email notification is sent to the administrator.
evals.expected_output: Test point design document with comprehensive coverage of configuration testing, boundary testing, and scenario testing for the auto-sync feature
expectations: Test points cover switch enable/disable behavior
Test points cover scheduled task execution (daily at 2 AM)
Test points cover failure scenarios and email notification
Boundary values are considered (first sync, consecutive failures)
State transition scenarios are included (off -> on -> off)
Output is saved as markdown files in the test_case directory

evals.prompt: Generate test cases: The user management page adds a bulk import feature that supports uploading an Excel file to batch-create users. The Excel template contains three columns: Username, Email, and Role. It supports a maximum of 1000 records. The import result needs to display the number of successes and failures, and a failure report must be downloadable.
evals.expected_output: Detailed test cases covering file upload, data validation, batch processing, error handling, and result reporting for the bulk import feature
expectations: Test cases cover normal Excel upload and processing
Test cases cover boundary values (0 records, 1 record, 1000 records, 1001 records)
Test cases cover invalid file types and malformed Excel files
Test cases cover data validation (invalid email, duplicate username, missing required fields)
Test cases cover error report generation and download functionality
